key_features: Round low-profile turret; Kontakt-5 ERA arrow pattern on glacis; six road wheels with no return rollers.
Flat angular turret; 120mm M256 smoothbore; CITV optic; gas-turbine exhaust grille on rear deck.
Long slender fuselage; V-tail with ventral fin; pusher prop; SATCOM bulge above nose; ~20m wingspan.
Inverted-V tail; pusher prop; small EO/IR ball under nose; ~12m wingspan; no SATCOM bulge (line-of-sight only).
Tandem cockpit; chin M230 30mm; Longbow millimeter-wave radar dome above main rotor; four-blade main rotor.
Coaxial counter-rotating main rotors (no tail rotor); side-by-side cockpit; ejection seats.
Twin widely-spaced engines; LEVCONs forward of wing root; all-moving canted twin tails; long tailcone between engines.
Delta wing with vertical winglets; pusher prop; ~3.5m wingspan; warhead in nose.
Welded turret with Relikt ERA wedges; Sosna-U gunner sight on left of mantlet.
Single engine; chined nose with EOTS sensor under nose; canted twin tails; internal weapons bays.
Canard-delta layout; twin canted tails + ventral fins; chined nose; long fuselage.
Integrated mast with panel arrays; 112-cell VLS; ~13,000t; flush forecastle.
